transcript: Speaker A (AI Avatar): तुमचं English कसं आहे? [How is your English?] Speaker B (Human): थोडे-थोडे So, So. [A little bit, so-so.] Speaker A: What's your name? Speaker B: My name is Neha. Speaker A: Technically correct आहे, पण Natives असं नाही बोलत... ते Simple म्हणतात, I'm Neha. [Technically correct, but natives don't speak like this... they simply say, I'm Neha.] Speaker B: Okay... पण मला English practice करायला कोणीही नाहीये. [Okay... but I don't have anyone to practice English with.] Speaker A: अरे Problem नाहीये! AI English Tutor बद्दल ऐकलं नाही का? [Oh, no problem! Haven't you heard about AI English Tutor?] Speaker B: मला AI सोबत बोलून English शिकायचं नाहीये. [I don't want to learn English by talking to an AI.] Speaker A: माहिती आहे का? मी पण एक AI English Tutor आहे, MySivi मध्ये. [Do you know? I am also an AI English Tutor, in MySivi.] Speaker B: Wait... तू? [Wait... you?] Speaker A: हो, मी तुझ्यासाठी personalized study plan बनवणार, तुझ्या goals नुसार. आणि तू जितक्या mistakes करशील तितक्या कर. No embarrassment at all. [Yes, I will make a personalized study plan for you, according to your goals. And make as many mistakes as you want. No embarrassment at all.] Speaker B: Sounds good, पण मी तुझ्याशी बोलू कशी? [Sounds good, but how do I talk to you?] Speaker A: Simple आहे. फक्त MySivi App download कर. रोज फक्त 10 minutes दे ते. [It's simple. Just download the MySivi App. Give it just 10 minutes daily.] Speaker B: You know what, मी try करते! [You know what, I'll try!]
on_screen_text: तुमचं English कसं आहे? [How is your English?] थोडे-थोडे So, So. [A little bit, so-so.] What's Your Name? My Name Is Neha. Technically Correct आहे, [Technically correct,] पण Natives असं [but natives like this] नाही बोलत... [don't speak...] ते Simple म्हणतात, [They simply say,] I'm Neha. Okay... पण मला English [But to me English] Practice करायला [to practice] कोणीही नाहीये. [there is no one.] अरे Problem नाहीये! [Oh, no problem!] Ai English Tutor बद्दल ऐकलं नाही का? [haven't you heard about?] मला AI सोबत बोलून [To me talking with AI] English शिकायचं [to learn English] नाहीये. [is not wanted.] माहिती आहे का? [Do you know?] मी पण एक Ai English [I am also an AI English] Tutor आहे, [Tutor,] Mysivi मध्ये. [in Mysivi.] MySivi Wait... तू? [Wait... you?] हो... [Yes...] मी तुझ्यासाठी [I for you] Personalised Study Plan बनवणार, [will make a study plan,] तुझ्या Goals नुसार. [according to your goals.] आणि तू जितक्या [And you as many] Mistakes करशील [mistakes you make] तितक्या कर [make that many] No Embarrassment At All. Sounds Good, पण मी तुझ्याशी [but I with you] बोलू कशी? [how do I talk?] Simple आहे. [It's simple.] फक्त Mysivi App [Just Mysivi App] Download कर. [download.] MySivi रोज फक्त 10 Minutes [Daily just 10 minutes] दे ते. [give to it.] You know what, मी Try करते! [I will try!]
summary: A young woman has a simulated video call with an AI avatar from the MySivi app. The AI avatar corrects her English introduction and explains how the app offers personalized study plans and a judgment-free environment to practice speaking. The ad ends with a call to action to download the MySivi app and practice for 10 minutes daily.
